title: Would Asuka have gone emo if
display_title: Would Asuka have gone emo if
wikitext:
[]: Would Asuka have gone emo if...             Quote Post by narcosis219 » Sat Sep 30, 2006 2:25 am Well, emo as in hating everyone during mid to end of series and going into a coma. So, would she have gone emo if Shinji had held her when they kissed in ep. 15?

[]: Re: Would Asuka have gone emo if...             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Sat Sep 30, 2006 2:28 am narcosis219 wrote: So, would she have gone emo if Shinji had held her when they kissed in ep. 15?

[]: Re: Would Asuka have gone emo if...             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Sep 30, 2006 5:20 am narcosis219 wrote: Well, emo as in hating everyone during mid to end of series and going into a coma.

[]: Re: Would Asuka have gone emo if...             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sat Sep 30, 2006 6:15 am Legend of the Past wrote: narcosis219 wrote: So, would she have gone emo if Shinji had held her when they kissed in ep. 15?

[]: Re: Would Asuka have gone emo if...             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Sep 30, 2006 6:26 am the_seventh_child wrote: Yeah, that's right. I believe episode 22, was the beggining of Asuka's highway to hell!

[]: Re: Would Asuka have gone emo if...             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sat Sep 30, 2006 8:43 am Mr. Tines wrote: the_seventh_child wrote: Yeah, that's right. I believe episode 22, was the beggining of Asuka's highway to hell!

[]: Re: Would Asuka have gone emo if...             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat Sep 30, 2006 9:21 am narcosis219 wrote: So, would she have gone emo if Shinji had held her when they kissed in ep. 15?

[]: Re: Would Asuka have gone emo if...             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Sep 30, 2006 12:11 pm narcosis219 wrote: Well, emo as in hating everyone during mid to end of series and going into a coma. So, would she have gone emo if Shinji had held her when they kissed in ep. 15?

[]: Re: Would Asuka have gone emo if...             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sat Sep 30, 2006 12:17 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: If Shinji is an emo band like Dashboard Confessional or Simple Plan, Asuka would be some sort of harder band like Limp Bizkit, Cold, Stabbing Westward, or Staind.

[]: Re: Would Asuka have gone emo if...             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Sep 30, 2006 12:34 pm MaggotMaster wrote: Rei = John Cage's 4'33"

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Sat Sep 30, 2006 1:03 pm If I had to compare them to musicians (Not emo because I don't listen to emo) i'd put Asuka at a Roger Waters level. Although i'm an Asuka fanboy she is agressive to others, has to get her own way, when depressed she lashes out and has an ego the size of the geofront. I wouldn't say any of the characters are emo, just generally fucked up.

[]:             Quote Post by Mundane » Sat Sep 30, 2006 3:25 pm If I had to compare Asuka to any musician, it would have to be Glenn Danzig. Nobody has an ego bigger than his, nobody.

[]:             Quote Post by AuthenticM » Sun Oct 01, 2006 4:46 pm What's 'emo'?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Oct 01, 2006 4:54 pm AuthenticM wrote: What's 'emo'?

[]:             Quote Post by Mundane » Sun Oct 01, 2006 4:55 pm Early emo, to describe it in short was kind of like punk against punk. Now it's just kids who don't get hugged enough and unsuccessfully try to kill themselves.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sun Oct 01, 2006 7:40 pm AuthenticM wrote: What's 'emo'?

[]:             Quote Post by Mundane » Mon Oct 02, 2006 1:11 am MaggotMaster wrote: AuthenticM wrote: What's 'emo'?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Oct 02, 2006 1:18 am "What is man? Why is he crying?" because we're going off topic here.

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Mon Oct 09, 2006 7:51 am Depends... Were her actions lustful? Or just merely a way to find acceptance among others? *Sighs and rubs head* I need more Pepsi. Asuka isn't modern day emo, though she could be some futuristic kind... Mind you, we're still a decade away (roughly) from Evangelion's time frame. As far as I'm concerned, emos want to find acceptance through acting/feeling depressed... Asuka was just like... A complete fuck up by that point. Emos insult me, they're not actually depressed and crazier than shit like I am Yay for Dissociative Identity Disorder!

[]: Re: Would Asuka have gone emo if...             Quote Post by Evangelion Oi! » Thu Oct 19, 2006 12:54 am The Eva Monkey wrote: narcosis219 wrote: Well, emo as in hating everyone during mid to end of series and going into a coma. So, would she have gone emo if Shinji had held her when they kissed in ep. 15?
